purpose: Human-maintained log of which sites are wrong/outdated for which partner skill facts. Update as screenshots and in-game checks accumulate. Separate from auto cross-source-diff.json.

game8.value: Allows Lamball to be used as a shield. When assigned to the Ranch, Lamball produces Wool.

wiki-gg.value: When activated, equips to the player and becomes a shield. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

paldb.value: When activated, equips to the player and becomes a shield. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

entries.correctValue: When activated, equips to the player and becomes a shield. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.
entries.notes: Game8 softens activation wording and says Lamball produces Wool instead of sometimes drops Wool.

game8.value: Increases the player's max carrying capacity by a small amount while Cattiva is on the team.

wiki-gg.value: While in team, Cattiva helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.

paldb.value: While in party, Cattiva helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity by (100~200). (Does not stack)

entries.correctValue: While in party, Cattiva helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity by 100. (Does not stack)
entries.notes: In-game Palpedia shows fixed +100 and (Does not stack). wiki-gg says team and omits number. paldb uses range (100~200). fandom carry table 50-90 conflicts with shown 100.

game8.value: When assigned to the Ranch, Chikipi produces Eggs.

wiki-gg.value: Sometimes lays an Egg when assigned to Ranch.

paldb.value: Sometimes lays an Egg when assigned to Ranch.

entries.correctValue: Sometimes lays an Egg when assigned to Ranch.
entries.notes: Game8 says produces Eggs instead of sometimes lays an Egg.

game8.value: While in the party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Muddy.

paldb.value: While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Muddy by (50~65)%. (Does not stack)

entries.correctValue: While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Muddy by 50%. (Does not stack)
entries.notes: In-game Palpedia shows fixed +50% and (Does not stack). paldb uses range (50~65)%. game8 omits percent and stack note. wiki-gg has no Pierdon entry.

game8.value: Requires Lifmunk's Submachine Gun. While Lifmunk is the active Pal, activate its Partner Skill and it will ride on the player's head, shooting a submachine gun as the player attacks.

wiki-gg.value: When activated, leaps onto the player's head and uses a submachine gun to follow up player attacks.

paldb.value: When activated, leaps onto the player's head and uses a submachine gun to follows up player attacks.

entries.correctValue: When activated, leaps onto the player's head and uses a submachine gun to follows up player attacks.
entries.notes: In-game Palpedia uses 'to follows up' (grammar quirk). paldb matches. wiki-gg silently fixes to 'follow'. game8 rewrites and adds Submachine Gun requirement wording.

game8.value: Fuack slides at high speeds and hits the opponent, dealing Water elemental damage and soaks them in water.

wiki-gg.value: When activated, Fuack body surfs toward an enemy and slams into them.

paldb.value: When activated, Fuack body surfs towards an enemy and slams into them.

entries.correctValue: When activated, Fuack body surfs towards an enemy and slams into them.
entries.notes: wiki-gg uses toward not towards. game8 invents Water damage/soak wording.

game8.value: When activated, Fuack Ignis fire surfs towards an enemy and slams into them.

wiki-gg.value: When Activated, Fuack Ignis fire surfs towards and enemy and slams into them.

paldb.value: When activated, Fuack Ignis fire surfs towards an enemy and slams into them.

entries.correctValue: When activated, Fuack Ignis fire surfs towards an enemy and slams into them.
entries.notes: wiki-gg capital Activated and missing 'an' before enemy.

game8.value: When grazing in the Ranch, Vixy occasionally finds Pals Spheres, Arrows, and Gold. Vixy can also find Mega Pal Spheres.

wiki-gg.value: Sometimes digs up items from the ground when assigned to Ranch

paldb.value: Sometimes digs up items from the ground when assigned to Ranch.

entries.correctValue: Sometimes digs up items from the ground when assigned to Ranch.
entries.notes: game8 lists specific loot instead of generic items wording.

game8.value: While in the team, increases the glider’s speed and movement while preventing fall damage.

wiki-gg.value: While in team, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Increases speed while gliding for an extended time.

paldb.value: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Prevents fall damage and extends the duration of high-speed gliding.

entries.correctValue: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Prevents fall damage and extends the duration of high-speed gliding.
entries.notes: In-game uses party not team; second line is fall damage + high-speed gliding duration. wiki-gg omits fall damage and rewords speed.

game8.value: While in the party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Prevents fall damage and extends the duration of high-speed gliding.

wiki-gg.value: While in team, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Increases speed while gliding for an extended time.

paldb.value: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Prevents fall damage and extends the duration of high-speed gliding.

entries.correctValue: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Prevents fall damage and extends the duration of high-speed gliding.
entries.notes: game8 inserts 'the' before party. wiki-gg team + omits fall damage.

game8.value: Powers up the attack of Neutral Pals in the party while Cremis is in the party. When assigned to the Ranch, Cremis produces Wool.

wiki-gg.value: While in team, increases Attack of Neutral Pals. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

paldb.value: While in party, increases Attack of Neutral Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

entries.correctValue: While in party, increases Attack of Neutral Pals by 15%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.
entries.notes: Palpedia fixed +15%. paldb range. wiki-gg team without percent. game8 produces Wool paraphrase.

game8.value: When activated, Croajiro puffs up its abdomen to store energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air. While airborne before landing, the player's attack is increased.

wiki-gg.value: When activated, Croajiro swells its abdomen and channels its loyalty to build up energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air.

paldb.value: When activated, Croajiro Noct channels its loyalty and puffs up its abdomen to store energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air. While airborne before landing, the player's Attack is increased by (50~86)%.

entries.correctValue: When activated, Croajiro Noct channels its loyalty and puffs up its abdomen to store energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air. While airborne before landing, the player's Attack is increased by 50%.
entries.notes: In-game names Croajiro Noct on base Croajiro page (shared string). Fixed +50% Attack. wiki-gg omits airborne buff. game8 omits percent and says Croajiro not Croajiro Noct.

game8.value: When activated, Croajiro Noct swells its abdomen and channels its loyalty to build up energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air. While in team, increases attack power of Dark Pals.

wiki-gg.value: When activated, Croajiro Noct swells its abdomen and channels its loyalty to build up energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air. While in team, increases Attack of Dark pals.

paldb.value: When activated, Croajiro Noct channels its loyalty and puffs up its abdomen to store energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air. While in party, improves player's and Pals' Dark damage to enemy weak points by (25~40)%. (Does not stack)

entries.correctValue: When activated, Croajiro Noct channels its loyalty and puffs up its abdomen to store energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air. While in party, improves player's and Pals' Dark damage to enemy weak points by 25%. (Does not stack)
entries.notes: Second effect is Dark weak-point damage +25% for player and Pals, not general Dark Attack. Fixed percent; paldb range.

game8.value: While in team, restores the player's Max Health when incapacitated.

wiki-gg.value: While in team, Herbil uses its healing powers to revive the player when incapacitated.

paldb.value: While in party, Herbil uses its healing powers to restore (30~60)% of the player's Max Health when incapacitated.

entries.correctValue: While in party, Herbil uses its healing powers to restore 30% of the player's Max Health when incapacitated.
entries.notes: Fixed restore 30% Max Health; not generic revive. party not team.

game8.value: Teafant heals the player for a set amount per level of Soothing Shower when activated.

wiki-gg.value: When activated, spouts mysterious water that soothes wounds and restores the player's Health.

paldb.value: While in party, restores (20~40)% of the player's Health when Health falls below 30%. (Does not stack) (120-second cooldown after activation)

entries.correctValue: While in party, restores 20% of the player's Health when Health falls below 30%. (Does not stack) (120-second cooldown after activation)
entries.notes: Passive low-HP heal 20% with 120s CD. wiki-gg/game8 still describe active spout heal.

game8.value: Increases the player's logging efficiency and reduces the weight of all wood types while Gumoss is in the party.

wiki-gg.value: While in team, improves efficiency of cutting trees.

paldb.value: While in party, improves logging efficiency by (30~50)% and reduces weight of all types of wood by (40~60)%. (Does not stack)

entries.correctValue: While in party, improves logging efficiency by 30% and reduces weight of all types of wood by 40%. (Does not stack)
entries.notes: Fixed 30% logging efficiency and 40% wood weight reduction. paldb ranges. wiki-gg team + no numbers.

game8.value: While in the Party, increases the player's melee weapon damage.

paldb.value: While in party, increases the player's melee weapon damage by (10~35)%. (Does not stack)

entries.correctValue: While in party, increases the player's melee weapon damage by 10%. (Does not stack)
entries.notes: Fixed +10% melee weapon damage. paldb range. game8 omits percent. wiki-gg missing Pupperai.

game8.value: While at a base, increased Gathering Work Sustainability Level for all other Base Pals.

paldb.value: While at a base, increases the Gathering Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

entries.correctValue: While at a base, increases the Gathering Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)
entries.notes: game8 miswrites Suitability as Sustainability and omits +1 and stack note. wiki-gg missing.

game8.value: Equips Jolthog in the player's hand. When thrown, it creates a large electric explosion on impact, dealing damage and shocking enemies hit which stuns them and makes them easier to catch for a moment. The damage increases for each level of Jolt Bomb.

wiki-gg.value: When activated, equips Jolthog to the player's hand. When thrown at an enemy, causes an electrical explosion upon impact.

paldb.value: When activated, equips Jolthog to the player to be thrown at an enemy, causing an Electric explosion upon impact.

entries.correctValue: When activated, equips Jolthog to the player to be thrown at an enemy, causing an Electric explosion upon impact.
entries.notes: wiki-gg rewords hand/electrical. game8 adds stun/catch and per-level damage not in Palpedia text.

game8.value: Equips Jolthog Cryst in the player's hand. When thrown, it creates a large cold explosion on impact, dealing damage and freezing enemies hit, making them easier to catch. The damage increases for each level of Cold Bomb.

wiki-gg.value: When activated, equips Jolthog Cryst to the player's hand. When thrown at an enemy, causes an icy explosion upon impact.

paldb.value: When activated, equips Jolthog Cryst to the player to be thrown at an enemy, causing an Ice explosion upon impact.

entries.correctValue: When activated, equips Jolthog Cryst to the player to be thrown at an enemy, causing an Ice explosion upon impact.
entries.notes: wiki-gg icy vs Ice. game8 freeze/catch and level scaling not in Palpedia text.

game8.value: Depresso gains a sudden burst of energy which increases its movement speed. The movement speed bonus increases for each level Caffeine Inoculation. May drop Venom Glands when assigned to a Ranch.

wiki-gg.value: When activated, Depresso drinks a massive amount of energy drinks, causing its movement speed to increase for a limited time.

paldb.value: When activated, Depresso chugs an entire energy drink, increasing its Movement Speed and Work Speed by (100~900)%. Sometimes drops Venom Gland when assigned to Ranch.

entries.correctValue: When activated, Depresso chugs an entire energy drink, increasing its Movement Speed and Work Speed by 100%. Sometimes drops Venom Gland when assigned to Ranch.
entries.notes: Fixed +100% Movement and Work Speed. paldb range. wiki-gg omits Work Speed and ranch drop. game8 movement-only + Glands plural.

game8.value: Arms a rocket launcher using Pengullet as ammo. On impact, Pengullet explodes and suffers lethal damage in exchange for dealing Neutral element damage, stunning any enemies it hits in a large area.

wiki-gg.value: When activated, the player equips a Rocket Launcher and fires Pengullet as ammunition. Pengullet explodes on contact and is incapacitated.

paldb.value: When activated, the player equips a Rocket Launcher to fire Pengullet as ammunition. Pengullet explodes on impact and is incapacitated.

entries.correctValue: When activated, the player equips a Rocket Launcher to fire Pengullet as ammunition. Pengullet explodes on impact and is incapacitated.
entries.notes: wiki-gg contact vs impact and and fires. game8 lethal/Neutral stun rewrite.

game8.value: When activated, the player equips a Rocket Launcher and fires Pengullet Lux as ammunition. Pengullet Lux explodes on contact and is incapacitated.

wiki-gg.value: When activated, the player equips a Rocket Launcher and fires Pengullet Lux as ammunition. Pengullet Lux explodes on contact and is incapacitated.

paldb.value: When activated, the player equips Pengullet Lux to fire Rocket Launcher as ammunition. Pengullet Lux explodes on impact and is incapacitated.

entries.correctValue: When activated, the player equips Pengullet Lux to fire Rocket Launcher as ammunition. Pengullet Lux explodes on impact and is incapacitated.
entries.notes: In-game matches paldb awkward subject order (equips Pengullet Lux to fire Rocket Launcher). wiki/game8 normalize to base Pengullet pattern.

game8.value: While Penking is your active Pal, it increases the amount of items Fire Pals drop when defeated.

wiki-gg.value: While fighting together, Fire Pals drop more items when defeated.

paldb.value: While in party, Fire Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

entries.correctValue: While in party, Fire Pals drop 40% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)
entries.notes: Party passive fixed 40%. not active-only or fighting-together without percent.

game8.value: While fighting together, improves Water Pals and the player's damage.

wiki-gg.value: While fighting together, Water Pals drop more items when defeated.

paldb.value: While in party, improves player's and Pals' Water damage to enemy weak points by (25~40)%. (Does not stack)

entries.correctValue: While in party, improves player's and Pals' Water damage to enemy weak points by 25%. (Does not stack)
entries.notes: Water weak-point damage 25%. wiki-gg still describes Fire-style drop buff for Water.

game8.value: While Hoocrates is in your party, your active Dark Pal's attack is increased.

wiki-gg.value: While in team, increases Attack of Dark Pals.

paldb.value: While in party, increases Attack of Dark Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

entries.correctValue: While in party, increases Attack of Dark Pals by 15%. (Does not stack)
entries.notes: Fixed 15% for Dark Pals generally. game8 active-only. wiki-gg no percent.

game8.value: When assigned to the Ranch, Melpaca produces Wool. Also enables Melpaca to be mounted. Enhances Kingpaca's Defense and Movement Speed while Melpaca is in the party.

wiki-gg.value: Can be Ridden. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

paldb.value: Can be ridden. While in party, increases Kingpaca's Defense and Movement Speed. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

entries.correctValue: Can be ridden. While in party, increases Kingpaca's Defense and Movement Speed. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.
entries.notes: Name is Pacapaca Wool. wiki-gg Pecapaca omits Kingpaca buff.

game8.value: Defense and Movement Speed increases for every Melpaca included in the party. Allows Kingpaca to be mounted.

wiki-gg.value: While in a team, Kingpaca helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.

paldb.value: Can be ridden. This Pal's Defense and Movement Speed increase by (5~14)% for each Melpaca in party.

entries.correctValue: Can be ridden. This Pal's Defense and Movement Speed increase by 5% for each Melpaca in party.
entries.notes: Fixed 5% per Melpaca. wiki-gg still documents old carry capacity skill.

game8.value: Can be ridden. This Pal's Defense and Movement Speed increase by 5% for each Melpaca in party.

wiki-gg.value: While in a team, Kingpaca Cryst helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.

paldb.value: Can be ridden. This Pal's Defense and Movement Speed increase by (5~14)% for each Melpaca in party.

entries.correctValue: Can be ridden. This Pal's Defense and Movement Speed increase by 5% for each Melpaca in party.
entries.notes: game8 matches fixed 5%. wiki-gg wrong skill name and carry weight text.

game8.value: Daedream accompanies you and follows up your attacks with dark magic that increase in damage for each level of Dream Chaser while it is in your party and not set as your active Pal.

wiki-gg.value: While in team, appears near the player. Follows up player attacks with magic bullets.

paldb.value: While in party, appears near the player. Attacks hostile enemies with Dark magic bullets. These bullets will not reduce the target's Health below 1.

entries.correctValue: While in party, appears near the player. Attacks hostile enemies with Dark magic bullets. These bullets will not reduce the target's Health below 1.
entries.notes: Autonomous Dark bullets with HP floor 1; not follow-up-only. wiki/game8 outdated follow-up wording.

game8.value: Tanzee arms itself with an assault rifle and shoots enemies in range, dealing neutral element damage for the skill's duration.

wiki-gg.value: When activated, Tanzee will mercilessly fire an assault rifle at nearby enemies for a limited time.

paldb.value: When activated, Tanzee will mercilessly fire an assault rifle at nearby enemies for a limited time.

entries.correctValue: When activated, detects the location of nearby Pal Effigies.
entries.notes: wiki-gg still documents old Dark attack type conversion.

game8.value: When assigned to the Ranch, Flambelle produces Flame Organs. Slowly recovers health while outside of combat.

wiki-gg.value: Sometimes produces Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch.

paldb.value: While in party, recovers Health of the player and Party Pals by (0.1~0.5)% per second outside of combat. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch.

entries.correctValue: While in party, recovers Health of the player and Party Pals by 0.1% per second outside of combat. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch.
entries.notes: Fixed 0.1% per second heal for player and Party Pals.

game8.value: While Rooby is in your party, your active Fire Pal's defense is increased.

wiki-gg.value: While in team, increases Attack of Fire Pals.

paldb.value: While in party, increases Defense of Fire Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch.

game8.value: While in team, boosts the performance of the equipped glider. Allows for a slow and extended glide.

paldb.value: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables gentle floating while gliding for an extended time.

paldb.value: While in party, reduces the weight of ingredient and food by (30~60)%. When paired with another Ice Pal, their Rot Speed also reduces by (-30~-80)%. (Does not stack)

entries.correctValue: While in party, reduces the weight of ingredient and food by 30%. When paired with another Ice Pal, their Rot Speed also reduces by -30%. (Does not stack)
entries.notes: Fixed 30% food weight and -30% rot with Ice pal.

game8.value: Improves the player's mining and logging efficiency while riding Mammorest.

wiki-gg.value: Can be ridden. Improves efficiency of cutting trees and mining ores while mounted.

paldb.value: Can be ridden. While mounted, increases logging efficiency by (220~500)% and mining efficiency by (500~2000)%.

entries.correctValue: Can be ridden. While mounted, increases logging efficiency by 220% and mining efficiency by 500%.
entries.notes: Fixed 220% logging and 500% mining.

game8.value: Improves the player's mining and logging efficiency while riding Mammorest Cryst.

wiki-gg.value: Can be ridden. Improves efficiency of cutting trees and mining ores while mounted.

paldb.value: Can be ridden. While mounted, increases logging efficiency by (220~500)% and mining efficiency by (500~2000)%.

entries.correctValue: Can be ridden. While mounted, increases logging efficiency by 220% and mining efficiency by 500%.
entries.notes: Fixed 220% logging and 500% mining.

game8.value: While in team, Finsider changes the player's attack type to Water and increases Attack.

paldb.value: When activated, Finsider changes the player's attack type to Water and increases Attack by (30~50)%.

entries.correctValue: When activated, Finsider changes the player's attack type to Water and increases Attack by 30%.
entries.notes: Activated Water type + 30% Attack.

game8.value: Petallia heals the player for a set amount per level when activated. Raises the Planting work suitability level while at base.

wiki-gg.value: When activated, uses medicinal flowers to restore the player's Health.

paldb.value: When activated, soothing blossoms restore the player's Health by (75~85)%. While at a base, increases the Planting Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

entries.correctValue: When activated, soothing blossoms restore the player's Health by 75%. While at a base, increases the Planting Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)
entries.notes: Fixed 75% Health restore + Planting +1.

game8.value: This Pal's Attack and Defense increase by 2% for each other Grass Pal in your party.

paldb.value: This Pal's Attack and Defense increase by (2~6)% for each other Grass Pal in your party.

entries.correctValue: This Pal's Attack and Defense increase by 2% for each other Grass Pal in your party.
entries.notes: Fixed 2% Atk/Def per other Grass pal.

game8.value: Incineram attacks the target enemy with the Hellfire Claw skill, damaging and burning the enemy.

wiki-gg.value: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Hellfire Claw.

paldb.value: When activated, attacks the targeted enemy with Hellfire Claw. When this Pal uses Hellfire Claw, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier.

entries.correctValue: When activated, attacks the targeted enemy with Hellfire Claw. When this Pal uses Hellfire Claw, it has a x1.1 damage multiplier.
entries.notes: Fixed x1.1 Hellfire Claw multiplier.

game8.value: Dazzi accompanies you and follows up your attacks with lightning bolts that increase in damage per Partner Skill level while it is in your party and not set as your active Pal.

wiki-gg.value: While in team, appears near the player. Follows up player attacks with lightning bolts.

paldb.value: While in party, appears near the player. Attacks hostile enemies with Electric bolts. These bolts will not reduce the target's Health below 1.

entries.correctValue: While in party, appears near the player. Attacks hostile enemies with Electric bolts. These bolts will not reduce the target's Health below 1.
entries.notes: Autonomous Electric bolts, HP floor 1.

game8.value: Increases the player's attack significantly and changes the player's damage type to Fire while mounting Pyrin.

wiki-gg.value: Can be ridden. Changes the player's attack type to Fire while mounted.

paldb.value: Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Fire and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

entries.correctValue: Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Fire and increases Attack by 5%.

wiki-gg.value: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a missile launcher while mounted.

game8.value: While Foxcicle is in your party, the attack of your Ice Pals is powered up. Occasionally drops Ice Organ when to a Ranch.

game8.value: Increases the player's attack significantly, changes the player's damage type to Electric, and increases Movement Speed while mounting Beakon.

wiki-gg.value: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Changes the player's attack type to Electric while mounted.

paldb.value: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Electric and increases Attack by (5~20)%. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by (5~25)% for each other Electric Pal in your party. (Excluding Beakon)

entries.correctValue: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Electric and increases Attack by 5%. This Pal's Movement Speed increases by 5% for each other Electric Pal in your party. (Excluding Beakon)
entries.notes: Fixed 5% Attack and 5% MS per other Electric.

game8.value: Functions as a water mount that gains movement speed based on the number of Dark or Water Pals in the party.

paldb.value: Can be ridden to travel on water. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by (5~25)% for each other Dark or Water Pal in your party. (Excluding Ghangler)

entries.correctValue: Can be ridden to travel on water. This Pal's Movement Speed increases by 5% for each other Dark or Water Pal in your party. (Excluding Ghangler)
entries.notes: Fixed 5% MS per other Dark or Water.

game8.value: Functions as a water mount that gains movement speed based on the number of Fire or Water Pals in the party.

game8.value: Increases base mount speed and enables mounting for Rayhound. Allows Rayhound to double jump while mounted.

paldb.value: Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by (5~25)% for each other Electric Pal in your party. (Excluding Rayhound)

entries.correctValue: Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted. This Pal's Movement Speed increases by 5% for each other Electric Pal in your party. (Excluding Rayhound)

entries.correctValue: Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted. While in party, increases Defense of Ice Pals by 15%. (Does not stack)

game8.value: Increases the player's defense and the amount of items Electric Pals drop when defeated.

wiki-gg.value: When fighting together, increases the player's defense and Electric Pals drop more items when defeated.

paldb.value: While in party, player's Defense increases by (5~10)%, and Electric Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)
